channel.title: Table of Contents on Observer2
channel.description: Recent content in Table of Contents on Observer2

item.title: Configuration
item.description: Syntax highlighting and menus can be configured via config.toml.

item.title: Rtfm for Mobiles (Android)
item.description: RTFM for mobiles #pentest #mobile #fieldmanual ADB adb devices adb shell su adb kill-server See logs: adb logcat > log.txt Port forwarding example: adb forward tcp:31415 tcp:31415 JDB Useful to watch regarding debugging in Android applications Get PID list: Either

item.title: Windows Forensics Plan
item.description: Plan for Windows Forensics Done (Udemy watched, tools installed and used, conclusions made) is bolded: Prefetch LNK Shellbag Memory
